name: Osalasi CBT Invitation
description: Rivers State Government CBT examination invitation letter — Osalasi Company Limited branding.

address_lines: H/Office: Gwada_Shiroro Dam Express Road, Sabon Gurusu, Niger State

subject: SUBJECT: ALLOCATION OF COMPUTER-BASED TEST (CBT) EXAMINATION TIMETABLE
body_paragraphs: Following your successful shortlisting in the ongoing recruitment exercise to employ teachers into primary and secondary schools in Rivers State, we are pleased to formally notify you that the Rivers State Government is conducting the exercise in partnership with the Consultant, Osalasi Company Limited.
You are hereby invited to participate in the Computer-Based Test (CBT) as scheduled below:

field_rows.label: EXAMINATION CENTRE
field_rows.value: ICTC, Ignatius Ajuru University of Education, Rumuolumeni, Port Harcourt

notice: Please note that your examination number determines your specific date. You must strictly adhere to the assigned schedule.

instructions.heading: Important Instructions
items: Candidates must report to the examination venue at least one (1) hour before the scheduled time.
You are required to present a valid means of identification before entry into the examination hall.
The use of mobile phones, smart devices, or any electronic gadgets is strictly prohibited during the examination.
Any form of examination malpractice will result in immediate disqualification.

compliance.heading: Compliance Notice
compliance.text: Failure to appear on your assigned date, as indicated by your examination number, may lead to automatic forfeiture of your opportunity to proceed in the recruitment process. We wish you success as you proceed to this important stage of the selection process.

signature.name: Prof. Yunusa Danladi Hakimi
signature.title: For: Rivers State Government & Osalasi Company Limited

footer.text: This document is system-generated and is unique to the candidate. Please bring a printed copy to the examination venue.
footer.credit: Developed by Chineme Dimkpa, Software Specialist (TX, USA)
